reviews.comment:
Nada malo que decir. Le hice el servicio al auto. Buenos precios en 3 cuotas sin interés.  Hasta las 16 abierto. Lo hace. Rápido y queda espectacular. Sacas el turno por la app. O te acercas al lugar. Los muchachos son gente que conoces de toda la vida. Siempre con la mejor.

(Translated by Google)
Nothing bad to say. I had my car serviced. Good prices with 3 interest-free installments. Open until 4 PM. They do a great job. Quick and the car looks fantastic. You can book an appointment through the app or just go to the shop. The guys are like old friends. Always very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMta2NfUk9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a desayunar y recibimos muy buena atención.  El lugar se encontraba impecable, había bastante gente pero hay mesas suficientes.  Conseguimos lo que buscábamos y estuvimos muy cómodos.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for breakfast and received excellent service. The place was spotless; it was quite busy, but there were plenty of tables. We found what we were looking for and were very comfortable.
